arts.ttl: Mohamed Belloumi fitness update emerges as Hull City and player must agree on big call
arts.sum: Hull City ace Mohamed Belloumi must decide on the next steps in his rehabilitation from a season-ending knee injury, according to head coach Tim Walter. Belloumi is currently back in Algeria with family as he comes to terms with the news that his season is already over after picking up the devastating injury in the closing stages of City's 1-0 defeat at Oxford United earlier this month.

arts.ttl: Hull City star sends stark Birmingham City warning as Tigers face huge battle
arts.sum: Though Walter remains relaxed about City's current plight, Drameh says the players cannot afford to take anything for granted, and having experienced a surprise relegation at Birmingham City last season, the former Leeds United defender has issued a stark warning ahead of Tuesday night's huge Yorkshire derby against rivals Sheffield Wednesday at the MKM Stadium. Drameh admits as it stands, City have got themselves embroiled in a battle, and with just one win at home so far this season, must starting making the most of the groundswell of support at the MKM Stadium.
